ab: Makahi pacidek to ngangan no finacadan no Yin-Cu-min i mifonsiw i saka tosa patek tosa polo ira ko tosa miheca palisafon ko Ceng-Fu milofang.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: Liclicen ako to halafinay milongoc to Ceng-Fu a kapah no niyaro’ to “sapicidek pangangan no finacadan” i mifonsiw.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年。
en: I interviewed Noami Kulas, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: Nikaherekan to ako patonek cingra tonini pa’aliwacan tayra i loma’ ningra palafang.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: Yo piliclican i tiya i, pakafana’ to naicowaay kolalengatan no ngangan ningra ato pasifana’ to paro no loma’ ato niyaro’ ningra.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: Nawiro no pacici nosa sapifalican to ngangan han ako milicay tatiih hakiya lecaden tono katelangay pangangan?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: Pasowl sa i takonan ciira ano pakiholamen a tilid ko ngangan ako i caay ka saheci ko pilikorar saan, saka hinapangangan sa to 「Na singsi」 ko roma tamdaw i cingraan, orasaka, malo tatawaen tonika haen.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達我的名字，其他人經常叫他「那先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Na Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: Sowal sa ci Noami Kulas, “o tilid no Yin Cu Min ko sapangangan a sorit ko matatodongay ngangan no mita. o sapawacay no finacadan, ngasaw ato tatirengan no mita, nanay ’aloma’aloman ko padotocay to ngangan no tato’asan.”
ch: Noami Kulas說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Noami Kulas said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
